title: HUDs Combined
description: HUDs Combined turns your screen into a tactical weapon.
body:
**HUDs Combined** turns your screen into a tactical weapon. Tap your keybind to swap instantly between two battle-ready HUD modes built for real combat with either Fish! or First Rule. Swap to ClearView to remove player and simply delight in you surroundings or take screen shots and record video.

Fish! mode is your fishing mode, XP and boss bars intact, clean focus on rods, more screen space to enjoy some FISH! ;). When things get serious, switch to First Rule, the dedicated fight mode. The whole HUD drops away and you’re left with a razor sharp crosshair and hotbar. Hotbar auto hides after 3 seconds, letting you focus on the fight, great for both sweaty PvP and sweaty PvE boss runs.

Then there’s ClearView mode. No health, no armor, no boss bars, and player removed in third person so your screen is nothing the skybox and the builds. Perfect for screen shots and viewing builds without player on screen simple clearview with full 360º player camera rotation.

OFF puts everything back to pure vanilla, no configs, no menus, just muscle memory ** PageUP** through OFF → Fish! → First Rule → ClearView and lock in the view that matches how hard you’re about to swing. Lightweight, client-side only.
